name: Android Development
description_en: Build production-quality Android apps following Google's official architecture and the NowInAndroid reference—Kotlin, Compose, MVVM, Hilt, Room, multi-module.
description_zh: 按 Google 官方架构与 NowInAndroid 范例构建生产级 Android 应用——Kotlin、Compose、MVVM、Hilt、Room、多模块。
long_en: Scaffolds projects, feature modules, screens, ViewModels, and repositories using bundled reference docs and templates that encode Google's recommended layering.
long_zh: 借助内置参考文档与模板搭建项目、功能模块、界面、ViewModel 与仓储,落地 Google 推荐的分层架构。
sec_note_en: Generates app code and Gradle config; review dependencies and build files before running.
sec_note_zh: 生成应用代码与 Gradle 配置;运行前请审阅依赖与构建文件。
